name: pwin-ai-opportunities
description: pWin.ai Opportunities as a shared multi-runtime bundle for federal scanning, digest lookup, feedback logging, and capture research

requiredArtifacts.name: opportunities
requiredArtifacts.description: Normalized federal opportunity records with source metadata

requiredArtifacts.name: explanations

requiredArtifacts.name: report
requiredArtifacts.description: Full dated report rendered by the scan workflow

requiredArtifacts.name: digest
requiredArtifacts.description: Concise dated digest rendered by the scan workflow
